title: No aggregate shouldPauseForReview boolean in signal JSON
rationale: Signal values mix types (boolean, string, array, number). Adding a shouldPauseForReview: false boolean would make the aggregate decision explicit without relying on the signal table.

title: No documentation that signal JSON records values not booleans
rationale: A one-line comment above the JSON block would prevent misinterpretation of the mixed-type signal object.

title: Mismatched phase names in examples (pre-existing from Phase 2)
rationale: Auto-approve report says Setup Infrastructure, Examples section says Core Scanner. Independent examples but could confuse.
